video_title: Calculus for Deep Learning: Derivatives and Gradients
speaker: Prof. Elena Rossi

chapters.title: Derivatives and Slope
chapters.transcript: The derivative measures rate of change. For f(x)=x^2, derivative is 2x. We use limits and difference quotients.

chapters.title: Partial Derivatives and Gradients
chapters.transcript: For multivariate functions, partial derivatives treat other variables constant. The gradient vector points in direction of steepest ascent.

chapters.title: Chain Rule and Backpropagation
chapters.transcript: The chain rule composes derivatives. Backpropagation is the chain rule applied to neural network computation graphs.

chapters.title: Optimization: Gradient Descent
chapters.transcript: Gradient descent updates parameters opposite the gradient. Learning rate controls step size. Stochastic gradient descent uses mini-batches.

chapters.title: Higher-order Derivatives
chapters.transcript: Hessian matrix contains second derivatives. Newton's method uses Hessian for faster convergence.
